ingredients_text: Vanilla Flavour Ice Cream (30%) (Skimmed Milk, Whey Protein Concentrate (Milk), Water, Coconut Fat, Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Emulsifier: Mono - And Diglycerides Of Fatty Acids; Stabilisers: Locust Bean Gum, Guar Gum; Flavouring), Chocolate Ice Cream (30%) (Skimmed Milk, Water, Whey Protein Concentrate (Milk), Sugar, Coconut Fat, Cocoa Powder*, Glucose-fructose Syrup, Fat Reduced Cocoa Powder*, Emulsifier: Mono - And Diglycerides Of Fatty Acids; Stabilisers: Locust Bean Gum, Guar Gum), Biscuit (19%) (Wheat Flour, Sugar, Coconut Fat, Emulsifier: Lecithins), Chocolate Flavoured Sauce (10%) (Glucose Syrup, Water, Sugar, Fat Reduced Cocoa Powder*, Maize Starch, Salt), Chocolate Flavoured Coating And Topping (9%) (Coconut Fat, Sugar, Fat Reduced Cocoa Powder*, Emulsifier: Lecithins), Hazelnuts (2%).
